caption: The video concludes with a vibrant and energetic outro screen, designed to thank viewers for watching. The background is a striking blue with dynamic black and white streaks radiating outward, creating a sense of excitement and movement. At the top, bold white text reads "THANKS FOR WATCHING STUD!" emphasizing gratitude and a casual, friendly tone. In the center, a large white circle stands out against the blue backdrop, possibly serving as a focal point or logo. At the bottom, social media handles for Instagram (@MATTHEWMEAGHER), Twitter (@PAPAMEAGZZ), and Twitch (MMG69) are displayed, encouraging viewers to follow the creator on various platforms. The overall design is modern and engaging, leaving a lasting impression on the audience.
